content: Events. <onlyinclude For dates within Great Britain and the British Empire, as well as in the Russian Empire, the "old style" <a href="Julian%20calendar" Julian calendar</a was used in 1715, and can be converted to the "new style" <a href="Gregorian%20calendar" Gregorian calendar</a (adopted in the British Empire in 1752 and in Russia in 1923) by adding 11 days.
